{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ registration.registration_id }} - Asian Night Market{% endblock %} {% block extra_head %} {% if registration.status == "approved" and stripe_publishable_key %} {% endif %} {% endblock %} {% macro equip_display(registration) %} {% set parts = [] %} {% if registration.electrical_equipment %} {% for item in registration.electrical_equipment.split(',') %} {% if item.strip() %}{% set _ = parts.append(EQUIP_LABELS.get(item.strip(), item.strip())) %}{% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% if registration.electrical_other %} {% set _ = parts.append(registration.electrical_other) %} {% endif %} {{ parts | join(", ") if parts else "None" }} {% endmacro %} {% block content %}

{{ registration.registration_id }} · {{ registration.status | vendor_status }}

Your registration is under review. We'll notify you by email once a decision is made.
{% elif registration.status == 'approved' %} {% set needs_payment = true %} {% set needs_insurance = not insurance_doc %} {% set insurance_pending = insurance_doc and not insurance_doc.is_approved %}
Your registration has been approved! {% if needs_payment and needs_insurance %} To secure your booth, please complete your payment and upload your liability insurance document below. {% elif needs_payment and insurance_pending %} Please complete your payment below. Your insurance document is under review. {% elif needs_payment %} Please complete your payment below to secure your booth. {% elif needs_insurance %} Please upload your liability insurance document below to complete your registration. {% elif insurance_pending %} Payment complete! Your insurance document is under review. {% else %} Payment and insurance are confirmed. {% endif %} {% if needs_insurance %}
Need help obtaining insurance? {% if settings and settings.contact_email %}Contact us{% else %}Contact the organizers{% endif %} — we're happy to assist. {% endif %}
{% elif registration.status == 'paid' %} {% set needs_insurance = not insurance_doc %} {% set insurance_pending = insurance_doc and not insurance_doc.is_approved %}
Payment received — thank you! {% if needs_insurance %} Please upload your liability insurance document below to complete your registration.
Need help obtaining insurance? {% if settings and settings.contact_email %}Contact us{% else %}Contact the organizers{% endif %} — we're happy to assist. {% elif insurance_pending %} Your insurance document is under review. {% else %} You're all set — payment and insurance are confirmed. {% endif %}

Reason: {{ registration.reversal_reason }}
{% endif %} {% if registration.status == "withdrawn" %}
This registration has been withdrawn. {% if registration.reversal_reason %}
Reason: {{ registration.reversal_reason }} {% endif %}

Waitlist position: #{{ waitlist_position }}
All {{ booth_type.name }} booths are currently reserved. Your application is #{{ waitlist_position }} on the waitlist and will be reviewed if a spot opens up.

{% if registration.payment_deadline %} {% set is_overdue = now is defined and now.timestamp() > registration.payment_deadline.timestamp() %}

The payment deadline has passed. Please complete your payment as soon as possible or contact the organizers.

Please complete your payment before this date to secure your booth space.
